title: LineItem
description: A line item representing a single product or service in a transaction, used for Level 3 processing data.

name.description: Name or description of the product or service.

description.description: Additional description of the line item.

kind.description: Whether this item is a debit (charge) or credit (discount).

quantity.description: Quantity of the line item as a decimal string.

unit_amount.description: Unit price of the line item as a decimal string.

total_amount.description: Total amount for this line item (quantity * unit_amount) as a decimal.

unit_of_measure.description: Unit of measure for the quantity, such as "each" or "kg".

tax_amount.description: Tax amount for this line item as a decimal string.
